summary: Implemented task continuation/takeover operator (task continue). Extended assignment types with continuation tracking, created CLI command with 5 supported reasons, updated task report to accept continuation agent reports, added 10 tests, updated docs. All 74 related tests pass. pnpm verify clean.

verification.command: pnpm --filter @narada2/cli exec vitest run test/commands/task-continue.test.ts test/commands/task-roster.test.ts test/commands/task-report.test.ts test/lib/task-governance.test.ts
